name: Lyssine 11.5" Wall Sconce (Set of 2) - SCN4116 - Brass/White - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the elegance of the Lyssine wall sconce set. Each 11.5 inch sconce combines the warmth of brass with the smooth finish of alabaster for a truly distinctive look. The metal body adds durability while the metal canopy complements the design. A fabric shade softly diffuses light to create an inviting atmosphere in any room. This set of two offers both practicality and style, making it a perfect addition to your home decor. The classic brass and white color scheme easily complements various interior styles, providing a touch of sophistication. Transform your living space with a lighting solution that blends form and function seamlessly.
